steps.title: Find the pitting rate
steps.content: The machine pits 12 pounds in 3 minutes. Divide to find the rate: $$\frac{12 \text{ pounds}}{3 \text{ minutes}} = 4 \text{ pounds per minute}$$

steps.title: Calculate time for 96 pounds
steps.content: At 4 pounds per minute, divide 96 by the rate to find the time: $$\frac{96 \text{ pounds}}{4 \text{ pounds per minute}} = 24 \text{ minutes}$$ This matches choice C — C is correct.
